S.FORM: Joe Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Joe Alexander, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oe alexan*er ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *oe alexan*er, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
